World.headline: 'Beyond shameless': TMC attacks BJP, EC after ex-Bengal CEO appointed chief secretary

World.headline: Hantavirus-hit cruise ship leaves Tenerife as WHO completes evacuation operation
World.summary: A cruise ship affected by Hantavirus has departed Tenerife following a complete evacuation operation overseen by the World Health Organization. The WHO ensured all passengers and crew were safely disembarked and necessary health protocols were followed. This marks a critical step in managing the outbreak and preventing further spread.
key_points: Hantavirus-hit cruise ship departed Tenerife.

World.headline: UAE secretly joined Iran war? Report claims covert strikes hit key oil refinery

World.headline: Trump Says US-Iran Ceasefire on 'Life Support', Accuses Iran of Backing Away from Uranium Deal
World.summary: Tensions between the US and Iran remain dangerously high, with Donald Trump claiming the Iran ceasefire is on "massive life support" and calling Iran's latest proposal "garbage." He accused Tehran of abandoning key enriched uranium understandings and alleged Iran fired over 100 missiles at US warships. Despite the fiery rhetoric, Trump also suggested a diplomatic solution remains possible.
key_points: US-Iran tensions are dangerously high.

World.headline: Suvendu aide murder case: CBI takes over probe from Bengal Police, forms 7-member team
World.summary: The CBI has taken over the investigation into the murder of Chandranath Rath, an aide to Suvendu Adhikari, from the Bengal Police. Rath was shot dead by motorcycle-borne assailants in North 24 Parganas. Three suspects, including an alleged sharpshooter, have been arrested by the CID in Uttar Pradesh and Bihar.

Rath was an aide to Suvendu Adhikari.

World.headline: Senator Kelly Warns US Missile Stockpiles Dangerously Depleted by Iran War, Risks China Clash
World.summary: Senator Mark Kelly revealed that the US has significantly depleted its missile and munitions stockpiles due to the conflict with Iran, warning of vulnerability in future confrontations with China. This has sparked a political clash in Washington over military readiness and defense spending. Kelly described Pentagon briefings as "shocking" and detailed depletion of various advanced weapons systems.

World.headline: 'Can't intimidate us with barbed wire': Bangladesh puts border force on alert

World.headline: Trump Warns Iran, Accuses Tehran of "Playing Games" and Blames Obama for "Nuclear Mess"

The latest exchange signals rising pressure and growing uncertainty in US-Iran relations.

Sports.headline: IPL Playoff Scenarios: PBKS Chances Drop to 64.4% with 15 Matches Remaining

Chennai Super Kings and Rajasthan Royals hover around 54%, while Kolkata Knight Riders and Delhi Capitals face slim hopes, and Lucknow Super Giants and Mumbai Indians are eliminated.
